Key.Original: You cannot sell your %1 (%2) because it is not empty.
Key.English: You cannot sell your %1 (%2) because it is not empty.
Key.Russian: Вы не можете продать %1 (%2), поскольку он не пустой.

Key.Original: Only show items which the player can afford.
Key.English: Only show items which the player can afford.
Key.French: Ne montrer que les items achetables.
Key.German: Zeige nur Gegenstände, die sich der Spieler leisten kann.
Key.Russian: Показывать только предметы, на которые хватает денег
Key.Spanish: Mostrar solo objetos que pueda comprar.

Key.Original: Only show items that are avaliable for purchase.
Key.English: Only show items that are avaliable for purchase.
Key.Russian: Показывать только предметы, доступные к покупке.

Key.Original: Only show items which are in stock.
Key.English: Only show items which are in stock.
Key.French: Ne montrer que les items en stock.
Key.German: Zeige nur Gegenstände, die auf Lager sind.
Key.Russian: Показывать только предметы, доступные для продажи.

Key.Original: Only show items compatible with the player's equipped weapons.
Key.English: Only show items compatible with the player's equipped weapons.
Key.French: Ne montrer que les items compatibles.
Key.German: Zeige nur Gegenstände, die mit der ausgerüsteten Waffe des Spielers kompatibel sind.
Key.Russian: Показывать только предметы, совместимые с оружием игрока.
Key.Spanish: Mostrar solo objetos compatibles con armas equipadas.

Key.Original: Only show items that the player can sell.
Key.English: Only show items that the player can sell.
Key.Russian: Показывать только предметы, которые можно продать.

Key.Spanish: Equipar el articulo al comprar (si es posible).

Key.Original: Object does not have any inventory
You have bought stuff for a total of %1
Key.Spanish: Tu has comprado con un descuento por un total de %1
Key.French: Vous avez acheté du matériel pour un total de %1
Key.Chinese: 你購買了總價值為%1的物品
Key.Chinesesimp: 你购买了总价值为%1的物品

Key.Original: You have bought a %1 for %2, it has been stored in your garage
Key.Spanish: Usted a comprado un %1 por %2, se a almacenado en su garage
Key.French: Vous avez acheté un(e) %1 pour %2, il a été stocké dans votre garage
Key.Chinese: 你買了一部%1,花費%2,它被存到了你的車庫
Key.Chinesesimp: 你买了一部%1,花费%2, 它被存到了你的车库

Key.Original: You don't have enough money, requires %1
Key.French: Vous n'avez pas assez d'argent, il vous faut %1

Key.Original: ::ERROR:: Dialog Loading - Passed param type is not a STRING
Key.Spanish: ::ERROR:: Cargando Dialogo - El tipo de parámetro no es una cadena
Key.French: ::ERREUR:: Chargement Dialogue - Le paramètre passé n'est pas un STRING
Key.Chinese: ::錯誤:: 對話讀取 - 傳遞的參數不是String(字符)
Key.Chinesesimp: ::错误:: 对话读取 - 传递的参数不是String(字符)
Key.Russian: :: ОШИБКА:: Загрузка диалога - Переданный тип параметра не является STRING

Key.Original: ::ERROR:: Dialog Loading - Passed param is an empty STRING
Key.Spanish: ::ERROR:: Cargando Dialogo - El tipo de parametro es una cadena vacia
Key.French: ::ERREUR:: Chargement Dialogue - Le paramètre passé est un STRING vide
Key.Chinese: ::錯誤:: 對話讀取 - 傳遞的參數是空的String (字符)
Key.Chinesesimp: ::错误:: 对话读取 - 传递的参数是空的String(字符)
Key.Russian: ОШИБКА :: Загрузка диалогового окна - Переданный параметр - пустая строка.

Key.Original: ::ERROR:: Dialog Loading - Passed param type is not an ARRAY
Key.Spanish: ::ERROR:: Cargando Dialogo - El tipo de parametro no es un orden
Key.French: ::ERREUR:: Chargement Dialogue - Le paramètre passé n'est pas un ARRAY
Key.Chinese: ::錯誤:: 對話讀取 - 傳遞的參數不是一個Array (序列)
Key.Chinesesimp: ::错误:: 对话读取 - 传递的参数不是一个Array (序列)
Key.Russian: :: ОШИБКА :: Загрузка диалогового окна - Переданный тип параметра не является массивом

Key.Original: ::ERROR:: Dialog Loading - Passed param is an empty ARRAY
Key.Spanish: ::ERROR:: Cargando Dialogo - El parametro es una orden vacia
Key.French: ::ERREUR:: Chargement Dialogue - Le paramètre passé est un ARRAY vide
Key.Chinese: ::錯誤:: 對話讀取 - 傳遞的參數是一個空的Array (序列)
Key.Chinesesimp: ::错误:: 对话读取 - 传递的参数是一个空的Array (序列)
Key.Russian: :: ОШИБКА :: Загрузка диалогового окна - Переданный параметр - пустой массив

Key.Original: ::ERROR:: AI Setup (%1) - Passed param is not an OBJECT
Key.Spanish: ::ERROR:: Menu IA (%1) - Parámetro no es un objeto
Key.French: ::ERREUR:: Configuration IA (%1) - Le paramètre passé n'est pas un OBJET
Key.Chinese: ::錯誤:: AI設定 - 傳遞的參數不是一個Object (物件)
Key.Chinesesimp: ::错误:: AI设定 - 传递的参数不是一个Object (物件)
Key.Russian: :: ОШИБКА :: AI Setup (% 1) - Переданный параметр не является ОБЪЕКТОМ

Key.Original: ::ERROR:: AI Setup (%1) - Passed object is not kind of "Man"
Key.Spanish: ::ERROR:: Menu IA - Objeto pasado no es un "hombre" (%1) -
Key.French: ::ERREUR:: Configuration IA (%1) - L'object passé n'est pas de type "Man"
Key.Chinese: ::錯誤:: AI設定 - 參數的物件不是一個"人類"
Key.Chinesesimp: ::错误:: AI设定 - 参数的物件不是一个"人类"
Key.Russian: :: ОШИБКА :: AI Setup (% 1) - Пройденный объект не является "Man"

Key.Original: ::ERROR:: AI Setup (%1) - Passed object is a player
Key.Spanish: ::ERROR:: Menu IA - Objeto pasado es un jugador (%1) -
Key.French: ::ERREUR:: Configuration IA (%1) - L'objet passé est un joueur
Key.Chinese: ::錯誤:: AI設定 - 參數的物件是一個玩家
Key.Chinesesimp: ::错误:: AI设定 - 参数的物件是一个玩家
Key.Russian: :: ОШИБКА :: AI Setup (% 1) - Переданный объект - игрок

Key.Original: Looks like this shop is empty...
Key.Spanish: Parece que esta tienda está vacía...
Key.French: Il semblerait que ce magasin soit vide...

Key.Original: This trader/dealer is not interested in anything...
Key.Spanish: Este comerciante está interesado en nada...
Key.French: Ce commerçant n'est intéressé en rien...
Key.Chinese: 這個商人對什麽都不感興趣...
Key.Chinesesimp: 这个商人对什么都不感兴趣...

Key.Spanish: El valor no se puede ser vacia
Key.French: La valeur ne peut être vide

Key.Original: Value entered is not a number
Key.Spanish: El valor usado sobrepasa el número máximo
Key.French: La valeur entrée n'est pas un nombre
Key.Chinese: 輸入的數值不是一個數字
Key.Chinesesimp: 输入的数值不是一个数字

Key.Original: Value can't be negative or equal to zero
Key.Spanish: El valor no debe ser negativo o igual a cero
Key.French: La valeur ne peut ni être négative ni être égale à zéro
Key.Russian: Значение не может быть отрицательным или равным нулю

Key.Original: You can't give more than what you have
Key.Spanish: No puedes dar más dinero del que tienes
Key.French: Vous ne pouvez pas donner plus que ce que vous avez
Key.Chinese: 你不能給予別人超過你所擁有的
Key.Chinesesimp: 你不能给予别人超过你所拥有的
Key.Russian: Вы не можете дать больше,чем имеете

Key.French: Vous avez reçu %1 de la part de %2

Key.Original: You will receive your next paycheck in %1 minute(s)
Key.Spanish: Recibiras tu siguiente pago en %1 minuto(s)
Key.French: Vous recevrez votre prochain salaire dans %1 minute(s)
Key.Chinese: 你將會在%1分鐘后收到下一筆收入
Key.Chinesesimp: 你将会在%1分钟后收到下一笔收入

Key.Original: You have received a paycheck of %1
Key.French: Vous avez reçu un salaire de %1

Key.Original: You can't open inventory when it's locked
Key.Spanish: No puedes abrir el inventario cuando esta bloqueado
Key.French: Vous ne pouvez pas ouvrir l'inventaire quand c'est verrouillé
Key.Chinese: 它上鎖了，你打不開物品欄
Key.Chinesesimp: 它上锁了，你打不开物品栏
Key.Russian: Вы не можете открыть инвентарь,когда он заблокирован

Key.Original: Are you sure you want to empty the vehicle inventory?
Key.Spanish: ¿Estás seguro de vaciar el inventario del vehículo?
Key.French: Êtes-vous sur de vouloir vider l'inventaire du véhicule ?
Key.Chinese: 你確定要清空車輛的物品欄嗎?
Key.Chinesesimp: 你确定要清空车辆的物品栏吗?
Key.Russian: Вы уверены, что хотите очистить инвентарь техники?

Key.Spanish: Eso punto de reaparición es ocupado
Key.French: Ce point d'apparition est déjà occupé
Key.Chinese: 這個出生點已經被佔用
Key.Chinesesimp: 这个出生点已经被占用

Key.Original: All the available spawn points are busy
Key.Spanish: Todo los puntos de reaparición estan ocupados
Key.French: Tous les points d'apparition sont déjà occupés
Key.Chinese: 所有可用的出生點都被占用了
Key.Chinesesimp: 所有可用的出生点都被占用了

Key.Original: There are no vehicles on the store point
Key.Spanish: No está el vehiculo en el punto de guardado
Key.French: Il n'y a aucun véhicule sur le point de stockage

Key.Original: There are no owned vehicles on the store point
Key.Spanish: No hay vehiculos propios en el punto de la tienda
Key.French: Il n'y a aucun véhicule vous appartenant sur le point de stockage
Key.Chinese: 儲存點沒有自己擁有的載具
Key.Chinesesimp: 储存点没有自己拥有的载具

Key.Original: Congratulations! You have been promoted to %1 from %2
Key.Spanish: Felicitaciones! Has sido promocionado de %1 a %2
Key.French: Félicitations ! Vous êtes passé de %2 à %1

Key.Original: You have been demoted to %1 from %2
Key.French: Vous avez été dégradé de %2 à %1

Key.Original: You are now owner of a new vehicle (%1)
Key.Spanish: Ahora eres propietario de un nuevo vehiculo (%1)
Key.French: Vous êtes maintenant le propriétaire d'un nouveau véhicule (%1)
Key.Chinese: 你現在是一部新載具的主人(%1)
Key.Chinesesimp: 你现在是一部新载具的主人(%1)

Key.Original: It seems like your inventory is either full or it can't hold that many items
Key.Spanish: Al parecer su inventario esta lleno o tienes muchos objetos en la mano
Key.French: Il semblerait que votre inventaire soit plein ou qu'il ne puisse pas contenir autant d'items
Key.Chinese: 你的物品欄可能滿了,或者裝不下這麼多物品
Key.Chinesesimp: 你的物品栏可能满了,或者装不下这么多物品
Key.Russian: Похоже,ваш инвентарь либо полон,либо не может вместить столько предметов

Key.Original: You've been killed by an ADMINISTRATOR
Key.Spanish: Has sido asesinado por un ADMINISTRADOR
Key.French: Vous avez été tué par un ADMINISTRATEUR

Key.Original: [HG|extDB3] Saving method is set to "extDB" but it seems like extDB3 isn't loaded... server profile is being used as a fallback
Key.Spanish: [HG]extDB3] El metodo de guardado es en "extDB" pero al parecer este no carga...usando perfil de servidor como alternativa
Key.French: [HG|extDB3] La méthode de sauvegarde est sur "extDB" mais il semblerait qu'extDB3 ne soit pas initialisé... le profil serveur va être utilisé à la place
Key.Chinese: [HG|extDB3] 保存方法被設置為"extDB"，但似乎未加載extDB3...服務器配置文件被用作備用
Key.Chinesesimp: [HG|extDB3] 保存方法被设置为"extDB"，但似乎未加载extDB3...服务器配置文件被用作备用
Key.Russian: Метод сохранения установлен на "extDB",но похоже extDB3 не загружен ... профиль сервера используется как резервный

Key.Original: You have to be whitelisted to use this slot, please contact an admin for more infos
Key.French: Vous devez être whitelisé pour choisir ce slot, contactez un admin pour plus d'infos
Key.Chinese: 你必須被列入白名單才能使用此角色，請聯繫管理員了解更多信息。
Key.Chinesesimp: 你必须被列入白名单才能使用此角色，请联系管理员了解更多信息。
Key.Russian: Чтобы использовать этот слот, вы должны быть внесены в белый список. Для получения дополнительной информации обратитесь к администратору.

Key.Original: This feature is DISABLED (check enableXP in HG_Config.h)
Key.French: Cette action est DÉSACTIVÉE (vérifiez enableXP dans HG_Config.h)
Key.Chinese: 這個功能被關閉了(查看enableXP,位於HG_Config.h)
Key.Chinesesimp: 此功能被禁用了(查看位于HG_Config.h文件内的enableXP行)
Key.Russian: Эта функция ОТКЛЮЧЕНА (проверьте enableXP в HG_Config.h)

Key.Original: This feature is DISABLED (check enableKillCount in HG_Config.h)
Key.French: Cette action est DÉSACTIVÉE (vérifiez enableKillCount dans HG_Config.h)
Key.Chinese: 這個功能被關閉了(查看enableKillCount,位於HG_Config.h)
Key.Chinesesimp: 此功能被禁用了(查看位于HG_Config.h文件内的enableKillCount)
Key.Russian: Эта функция ОТКЛЮЧЕНА (проверьте enableKillCount в HG_Config.h)

Key.Original: Add selected UID to selected side
Key.French: Ajouter l'UID sélectionnée au camp sélectionné
Key.Chinese: 把選中的UID增加到選中的陣營
Key.Chinesesimp: 把选中的UID增加到选中的阵营
Key.Russian: Добавить выбранный UID на выбранную сторону

Key.Original: Remove selected UID from selected side
Key.French: Supprimer l'UID sélectionnée du camp sélectionné
Key.Chinese: 把選中的UID移除于選中的陣營
Key.Chinesesimp: 把选中的UID从选中的阵营中移除
Key.Russian: Удалить выбранный UID с выбранной стороны

Key.Original: UID field is not a number
UID field length is not valid, should be 17 characters (%1)
Key.French: L'UID n'est pas valide, il doit y avoir 17 caractères (%1)
Key.Chinese: UID字段長度無效，應該是17個數字(%1)
Key.Chinesesimp: UID字段长度无效，应该是17个数字(%1)
Key.Russian: Недопустимая длина поля UID, должна составлять 17 символов (%1)

Key.Original: This UID is already whitelisted on selected side
Key.French: Cette UID est déjà whitelisté dans le camp sélectionné
Key.Chinese: 此UID已在選定陣營的白名單中
Key.Chinesesimp: 此UID已在选定阵营的白名单中
Key.Russian: Этот UID уже внесен в белый список на выбранной стороне

Key.Original: You have added %1 to the %2 side whitelist
Key.French: Vous avez ajouté %1 à la whitelist du camp %2
Key.Chinese: 您已將%1添加到%2陣營的白名單中
Key.Chinesesimp: 您已将%1添加到%2阵营的白名单中

Key.Original: You have removed %1 from the %2 side whitelist
Key.French: Vous avez supprimé %1 de la whitelist du camp %2
Key.Chinese: 您已將%1從%2陣營的白名單中移除
Key.Chinesesimp: 您已将%1从%2阵营的白名单中移除

Key.Original: You have received a bank transfer from %1 (%2)
Key.French: Vous avez reçu un transfer d'argent de %1 (%2)

Key.Original: You cannot deposit more than what you have
Key.French: Vous ne pouvez pas déposer plus que ce que vous possédez
Key.Chinese: 你不能儲存多於當前現金的數額
Key.Chinesesimp: 你不能储存多于当前现金的数额
Key.Russian: Вы не можете внести больше,чем имеете

Key.Original: You cannot withdraw more than what you have
Key.French: Vous ne pouvez pas retirer plus que ce que vous possédez
Key.Chinese: 你不能提取多於賬戶餘額的現金
Key.Chinesesimp: 你不能提取多于账户余额的现金
Key.Russian: Вы не можете снять больше,чем имеете

Key.Original: You cannot transfer more than what's in the bank
Key.French: Vous ne pouvez pas faire un virement supérieur à votre compte bancaire
Key.Russian: Вы не можете перевести больше,чем есть в банке
Key.Chinese: 你轉賬的金額不能超過賬戶餘額
Key.Chinesesimp: 你转账的金额不能超过账户余额

Key.Spanish: Girar a la izquierda o a la derecha
Key.French: Tourne le joueur sur la gauche ou la droite

Key.Original: Delete selected vehicle *WILL BE LOST FOREVER*
Key.Spanish: Eliminar vehiculo seleccionado *LO PIERDES PARA SIEMPRE*
Key.French: Supprimer le véhicule sélectionné *IL SERA PERDU POUR TOUJOURS*
Key.Chinese: 刪除選中的載具（將永遠丟失）
Key.Chinesesimp: 删除选中的载具（将永远丢失）

Key.Spanish: Se está requiriendo el vehiculo en el spawn
El Vehiculo requerido a sido spawneado

Key.French: Le véhicule sélectionné va être supprimé...
Le véhicule sélectionné a été supprimé

Key.Original: Buy selected vehicle and store it to garage
Key.Spanish: Comprar el vehiculo seleccionado y guardarlo en el garage
Key.French: Acheter le véhicule sélectionné et le stocker dans le garage
Key.Chinese: 購買選中的載具并存到車庫
Key.Chinesesimp: 购买选中的载具并存到车库
Key.Russian: Купить выбранную технику и сохранить в гараже

Key.Chinese: 你賣出了你的%1, 獲得%2
Key.Chinesesimp: 你卖出了你的%1, 获得%2

Key.French: Donner la clé au joueur sélectionné

Key.Original: You have given the %1 key to %2
Key.French: Vous avez donné la clé de votre %1 à %2

Key.Original: %1 gave you the key of his %2
Key.French: %1 vous avez donné la clé de son %2

Key.Original: Adds the chance to spawn loot around wrecks.
Chance that Loot will spawn around wrecks
Can Military Loot spawn in Civilian Buildings?
Can Civilian Loot spawn in Military Buildings?
Chance of spawning Specific Medical loot in it's respectable Building Types
Chance of spawning Specific Food loot in it's respectable Building Types
Chance of spawning Specific Industrial loot in it's respectable Building Types
Chance of spawning Specific Military loot in it's respectable Building Types
Spawn Chance for an individual item
Spawn Chance for Cases full of items
Minimum Rounds that spawn with Grenade Launchers
Maximum Rounds that spawn with Grenade Launchers
Minimum Rounds that spawn with Launchers
Maximum Rounds that spawn with Launchers
Minimum Magazines that spawn with weapons
Maximum Magazines that spawn with weapons
Minimum Magazines that spawn in Ammo Boxes
Maximum Magazines that spawn in Ammo Boxes
Minimum Magazines that spawn in Cases
Maximum Magazines that spawn in Cases
Minimum amount of food that spawn in Cases
Maximum amount of food that spawn in Cases

%1 owes me some money, he hasn't paid up and rumour has it he's fucked off into the woods with a few friends. Kill him and his friends and I'll consider his debt paid. He was last seen hanging around %2,
I've marked it on your map where he was last seen and heard from.

Contract out for %1, he stole from a store owner and that shit isn't on. Him and his friends have fucked off around %2 give or take, money will be sent when he drops dead.
Your map is marked to where you should look.

Fucking %1 the dipship, he finally went too far and is now finding out. There's a bounty on his head and he and his boys have gone n fucked off to %2 , they were deadbeats so don't worry about em when you get the money from their profitable demise.
Marker has been placed on your map.

Contract: Killer
Target: %1
Last Seen: %2
Reasoning: Stolen from Merchants, Killed Courier on route to Suppliers. Life is forfeit.
Reward: Money will be sent when his life is terminated.
Risks: Has a number of hostile contacts.
Addtional Notes: Last Known Position has been marked on your map.

My buddy got slaughtered by %1 and his friends, he was the only guy here I could call an actual friend. They're probably still around %2 if you could go deal with them, I'll give you the last of my savings to take revenge on the pricks.
I'll mark where my buddy was going where I last heard from him.

%1 stole something personally from me, I won't name what it was but he has since sold it and I can't track it down so I'm doing the next best thing, take his life like he took my shit. He was last seen around %2 and make sure it hurts.
I'll reward you in return for this favour, I've also marked on your map where you should be able to find him.

%1 screwed around with the local government authority if you could call green goons with guns as authority, but money is money.
He was last seen around %2 and the money given to me by the local greenies for this job will be yours. Map has been marked.

I used to be good friends with %1 until he fucked me over with a job. It's the last straw and I want him dead. His hunting grounds is around %2 and I've marked it on your map.
I would pay you with what his life is worth but I can't give you nothing for this job so I'll give you some money instead.
I've been in deseperate need for %2, I need about %1. If you could get them for me I would reward you in turn.
My stocks have been low on %2, about %1 would do the trick. Fetch me them and I'll give you some money in return.
Someone bought up a lot of %2 but it's left me in a pinch, if you gather up %1 for me that would set me back to a decent level. I'll reward you of course.
Some thieving bastard has taken all my %2, god knows what else they've taken but if you could get me %1 of em I would appreciate it. Good deeds brings in good rewards.
If you're in need for some money, I need %2 for my stocks. About %1 should do it, bring em back to me once you've gathered em up and I'll sort you out.
I got an order that came in from someone, they said they need about %1 of %2 . If you gather em up for me, I'll give you a percentage of the cut from their order.
I'm looking for %1 %2 to stock up, I don't require them urgently but doesn't hurt to stock up. I'll ensure you're paid in due.
I wouldn't mind some spare %2 to have laying around, if you get me about %1 of em that should do it. Naturally I'll pay you for your time.
Search body for items, notes etc
Welcome to Zombie Framework!%1If you're new to this gamemode, you should check out the Getting Started guide on your map journal.
Zombies are being fought off by soldiers here. Provide support!
A few groups of demons are roaming this area. Clear them out!
This area is being guarded by raiders. Take them out!
This area has been infested with zombies. Clear them out!
A military research building has been found containing intel. Secure it!
We have been tasked to fight off zombies in this region.
A group of civilians have been taking shelter from the apocalypse. Save them!

ACE is being used by this mission. Here are some basic tips if you are not familiar with ACE:
- Hold [Ctrl+Windows] to show self-interactions
- Hover over an interaction and release to perform it
- Hold [Windows] to interact with players and objects
- If your weapon jams, you can unjam it by pressing [Shift+R]

If enabled, your weapon may overheat from firing too frequently. Having suppressors attached to your gun will cause it to heat up much more quickly. It is recommended to remove your suppressor when un-needed, or bring a canteen / water bottle to cool down your gun when needed.

In ACE, stamina management is critical to surviving in combat against zombies. If you sprint or move at low ready too often, you will quickly burn through your stamina, and running completely out of stamina will force you to walk.
To preserve stamina, lower your gun whenever possible by pressing [2xLeftCtrl], and also stand up so you can jog with the least effort. Carrying fewer items will also reduce the stamina needed to maneuver around.

There are various vehicle service stations around base. Once you are parked beside one, you will need to exit the vehicle to service it.
Refuel: Walk to the gas station / fuel container and interact with it to grab the fuel pump.
Rearm: Walk to the vehicle rearm container and interact with it to rearm your vehicle.
Repair: Grab a toolkit and interact with your vehicle to perform a "Full Repair".

At a rearm station, ACE can be used to replace weapon pylons on an existing aircraft:
1. Grab a toolkit.
2. Park the aircraft near a vehicle rearm station.
3. Exit the vehicle, interact with it, and select "Configure Pylons".
4. Choose the pylons you want and click "OK" to start replacing pylons.
5. Once complete, walk to the rearm station and interact with it to load the modified pylons with their corresponding munitions.
When you purchase a vehicle from a vendor, you will be given the keys for that vehicle. To unlock it: walk up to the vehicle, interact with it, and select "Unlock vehicle".

Using the ACE interaction menu, you can share points with other players to help them purchase more expensive items. When interacting with a player, you should see the options to share your points in increments.

This mission was developed by thegamecracks and ZenoVoid as part of the Warriors Haven Gaming community. You can find our development work on GitHub!

https://github.com/Warriors-Haven-Gaming/Zombie-Framework

This is an open world mission where you will be completing objectives across %1 to fight off the apocalypse.

Near your spawn should be a whiteboard that shows your statistics across game restarts. For server admins, this also allows them to perform administrative actions for the mission.

On the border of the map, you will see the amount of points you have measured in BP. This currency persists across restarts every time the mission is saved, which may be automatic if autosaving is enabled (the default), or otherwise manually saved by the server admin.

You gain points whenever you kill zombies or hostiles, or complete missions. As you accumulate points, your points multiplier also increases, allowing you to gain points more quickly. This points multiplier gets reset whenever you die or return to base. External factors can also affect your points multiplier, such as whether it is night time.

Shopkeepers at base can be used to purchase various items and services using the points you've earned, including vehicles and AI recruits. Kills achieved by recruits you've purchased will count towards your kill count and point rewards.

Safezones are marked on map in solid blue, indicating areas where zombies will not spawn in. Some missions produce safezones upon completion, but may only last for a certain period of time before disappearing. Note that safezones do not prevent zombies from entering them.

Zombies and Demons's infection module is enabled, meaning that zombie hits have a chance to cause infection. This infection will progress until it takes over motor functions, at which point you become a zombie. You can recover from infection by taking antivirus medications or by going through a decontamination shower.
You have reached the recruit limit of %1.
The vehicle spawn is currently obstructed.
Something went wrong with the purchase.
You cannot purchase %1! It requires %2, but you only have %3.
You cannot share %1 to this player as you only have %2.

Welcome back!

You earned %1 in this trip, reaching a multiplier of %2x.
You have shared %1 with %2! You have %3 left.
You were given %1 from %2! You now have %3.
You have refunded %1 for %2! You now have %3.
Your %1 was refunded to you at %2 for %3.
You have received ACE keys to unlock your %1.
Someone needs to stay near the intel laptop!
Intel has been downloaded! Time for you to move out!
Only your group leader can escort units!
Are you sure you want to save?
Are you sure you want to reset the current save?
You need %1 first aid kits to self-revive! (%2 missing)
Are you sure you want to enable autosaving?
Are you sure you want to disable autosaving?
The base multiplier applied to BP earned.\nNote that some income sources are exempt from multipliers.
The amount your BP multiplier will increase as the map becomes dark, especially at night.
The amount your BP multiplier will increase per BP earned.\nMeasured in thousandths of a percent, i.e. 5 means +0.005% per BP earned.

The amount your BP multiplier will increase per BP earned while outside of vehicles.\nThis stacks on top of the normal multiplier increase.\nMeasured in thousandths of a percent, i.e. 5 means +0.005% per BP earned.
The maximum time in seconds to refund a recent purchase.
The minimum time in seconds for purchase protection.\nAfter this, insurance will decrease to 0% at the maximum time.
The maximum time in seconds for purchase protection.\nAfter the minimum time, insurance will decrease to 0% at this time.
The maximum percentage of the purchase's original value covered by purchase protection.
Vehicles retain insurance after being brought outside their safezone.
Allow friendly fire damage from purchased recruits.
Allow friendly fire damage in base safezones.
The time in seconds at which dropped loot will be deleted.
The max distance from any player before mission objects can be deleted.
The max distance from any player before hidden objects (usually terrain) can be revealed.
The max distance from any player before a zombie can be garbage collected.
Save your loadout after closing the arsenal.
Temporarily lock purchased vehicles to the owner.
When ACE is loaded, replace the one-time unlock action with inventory keys.
The minimum number of main missions allowed.\nIf there are fewer main missions than this, the gamemode will spawn more missions up to the maximum.\nSet to 0 to disable main missions completely.
The maximum number of main missions to spawn.
The minimum number of side missions allowed.\nIf there are fewer side missions than this, the gamemode will spawn more missions up to the maximum.\nSet to 0 to disable side missions completely.
The maximum number of side missions to spawn.
Play various music tracks in a loop indefinitely. Requires Music volume to be unmuted.
The maximum number of recruits that can be commanded per player group.
The name of the save to use. This can be used for storing multiple saves.
The frequency at which the gamemode autosaves in seconds.\nAutosaving must be manually toggled using the physical, admin board prop.
The time in seconds to wait before able to self-revive.
The duration in seconds needed to hold the self-revive action.
The number of first aid kits required to self-revive.
The duration in seconds needed to unflip vehicles.
The maximum vehicle angle allowed to be unflipped.\n100% is straight up (always allowed), 0% is at least perpendicular to terrain, and -100% is exactly straight down.
The distance in metres to search around the vehicle for an empty position.\nHigh values may worsen performance.
Spawn vehicle wrecks along roads as obstacles.
The approximate distance in metres between vehicle wrecks.\nCAUTION: Lowering this can dramatically increase the number of wrecks spawned across the map.
The density multiplier for wrecks near a town.
The maximum distance from a road to a town to apply the town factor.\nThe town factor is applied linearly based on the distance to the town's center.
Vehicle wrecks will be oriented to roughly match their side of the road.
Allow vehicle wrecks to spawn in safezones.\nSince wrecks are spawned at the start of each game, this does not apply to dynamically generated safezones.
An array of wreck classnames to spawn as simple objects.
The frequency in seconds at which the loitering zombie threshold is updated.\nWhen there are more zombies than the current threshold, ambient zombies will stop spawning to save performance.
The minimum threshold allowed for loitering zombies.\nIncrease this for more ambient zombies.
The maximum threshold allowed for loitering zombies. Takes priority over minimum.
The number of zombies to add to the threshold for each connected player.
A random number of zombies to add to the threshold every time it is updated.\nThis can make hordes randomly appear more or less frequently.
The maximum altitude in metres that players can trigger loitering zombies.
Allow loitering zombies to spawn inside safezones. Mission hordes can spawn regardless of this setting.
The speed in km/h at which loitering zombies will always trigger.\nStacks with other factors.
The chance increase of loitering zombies when in a vehicle with a running engine.\nStacks with other factors.
The chance increase of loitering zombies when in the dark with a vehicle's headlights on.\nStacks with other factors.
The chance increase of loitering zombies when in the dark with a weapon flashlight on.\nStacks with other factors.
The chance increase of loitering zombies when near a town.\nStacks with other factors.
The maximum distance in metres from a town considered for loitering zombies. Lower values may improve performance.
The radius in metres from the center of a town where the town factor is highest.
The minimum chance of loitering zombies spawning.
The faction that zombies will spawn as. Using OPFOR means zombies will not attack regular enemies.\nChanging this will not retroactively apply to existing zombies.
The chance that a zombie will drop a First Aid Kit.
The chance that a zombie will drop Antivirus Pills.
The chance that a non-soldier zombie will drop magazines.
The chance that a soldier zombie will drop magazines.
The maximum number of magazines that a non-soldier zombie can drop.
The maximum number of magazines that a soldier zombie can drop.
The chance that a non-soldier zombie will drop a weapon.
The chance that a soldier zombie will drop a weapon.
An array of weapon classnames to randomly select from.
The maximum number of magazines to drop alongside the weapon.
Determines how high zombies can jump.
Determines how high demons can jump.
The delay in seconds between zombie attacks. Does not apply to demons.
The distance in metres that zombie attacks can reach.
The damage dealt to humans as a percentage.
The damage dealt to cars as a percentage.
The damage dealt to aircraft as a percentage.
The damage dealt to tanks as a percentage.
The chance a victim will become infected if attacked by a zombie.
The percentage of infection applied to the victim each minute.
Infected units can show symptoms or be unknowingly infected.
The sound infected units will make if they die from infection.
Duration in seconds the consumer is immune to infection and its symptoms.
The speed multiplier for slow zombies.
The speed multiplier for medium zombies.
The speed multiplier for fast zombies.
The speed multiplier for spider zombies.
The speed multiplier for crawler zombies.
The speed multiplier for walker zombies.
The speed multiplier for player zombies.
The zombie type that victims will resurrect into.
The time it takes after the victim has died to resurrect.
Forces the victims to resurrect with the victims uniform.\nThis stops the custom animations from working.
Defines what weapon type is required for decapitation.
Allows zombie eyes to glow red.
Allows demon eyes to glow red.
Defines if headshots are needed to kill zombies.
Allows zombies and targets to bleed when hit, injured or infected.
Allow idle zombies to make sounds.
Allow attacking zombies to make sounds.
Allow zombies to make sounds when jumping.
Defines how much damage zombies can take.
Defines how much damage demons can take.
There is not enough space around the vehicle to unflip it!
